title: ficus leucocarpa
intro: Ficus leucocarpa, also known as the Queensland strangler fig, is a species of fig tree native to Australia. The bark of this plant contains medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Ficus leucocarpa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues. The bark can be prepared as an herbal remedy, typically in the form of a decoction or tincture, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
